[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000010001 2
1 1010000001 3
2 1101000000 3
3 0001101000 3
4 0000100001 2
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000000 a
7 1101000000 3

01 1111010011 7
12 0110100110 5
23 1101011101 7
34 0011101101 6
45 1010010001 4
56 0001101111 6
67 0101101111 7
70 1001010100 4

13 0100000100 2
24 0001001111 5
35 0110000011 4
46 0100000001 2
57 1011111111 9

71 1001111000 5

50 1101010100 5
61 0011101000 4
72 0000100001 2 match 4
